About Me

Let me tell you a few things...

BIO

I am passionate about branding, UX/UI, web design and web development, and I work hard everyday to ensure that I become the best possible version of myself.

Some personal skills that I believe define my personality include effective communication, proactivity, determination, critical thinking, creativity and resilience.

I just love to work. Check out my professional experience below...

Deloitte

Information Systems Risk Assurance Auditor
sep 2014 – sep 2016 [2 years]

Thoroughly analyzing all risks that affected the systems, technologies, processes, network, people and overall environment of 18 top tier audited clients.

The goal was to ensure the confidentiality, integrity and availability of all information assets.

Deloitte Digital

Java Developer – NOS CRM
sep 2016 – sep 2017 [1 year]

Development of the new NOS CRM, while maintaining the functionalities, services, multiple data repositories and client data from two other legacy CRM's (ZON and Optimus legacy CRM's).

My goal was to analyse existing services within legacy systems and develop them directly in NOS WAVE (the new CRM) through Java OOP.

Deloitte Digital

Quality Assurance Tester – NOS CRM
sep 2017 – nov 2017 [3 months]

After completing my Java task requirements in the Legacy team, I was invited to join the QA team.

My goal was able to support the QA team in testing and validating the quality of requirements and resources defined and developed by the other teams.

ANF Group

Lead Risk Officer
nov 2018 – Ongoing [2 years]

Developed a robust framework to strategically and proactively manage all risks of the ANF Group.

Managed the Group’s risk strategy, teams and growth.

Independent Projects

Freelancer - Web Designer and Developer and Digital Strategist
august 2014 – Ongoing [5 years]

Freelance website development for friends, family and clients (wordpress and/or shopify). The scope of these projects varied greatly from project to project - when the project was for a client, their budget was the most relevant variable

Most times I developed the front end (HTML, CSS, Sass, and Vanilla Javascipt) from scratch, but sometimes I adapted the frontend code from a template selected by the client based on their needs.

Occasionally these projects included branding and logo design services, UX/UI research and design and also digital strategy (SEO, SEM and community content production and sharing).
